units.source_text: During 2025, consistent with the Group’s capital plan, the Group’s material subsidiaries did not experience any significant restrictions on paying
units.translation_target_text: 2025年，与本集团资本计划一致，本集团重要子公司在支付方面未出现任何重大限制。

units.source_text: dividends or repaying loans and advances. Also, there are no foreseen restrictions envisaged with regard to planned dividends or payments from
units.translation_target_text: 股息或偿还贷款和垫款。此外，对于计划的股息或支付，没有预见到的限制。

units.source_text: material subsidiaries. However, the ability of subsidiaries to pay dividends or advance monies to HSBC Holdings depends on, among other things,
units.translation_target_text: 材料子公司。然而，子公司向汇丰控股支付股息或预付款的能力取决于以下因素：
units.translation_zh: 材料子公司。然而，子公司向汇丰控股支付股息或预付款的能力取决于以下因素：
